title: Orron III

{{Quote|Orron III. That's mostly an agricultural world, except that the Authority has a data center there.|Jessa Vandangante|<ref name="HSaSE">''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]''</ref>}}
'''Orron III''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural world]] located in the [[Orron system/Legends|Orron system]], in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. An [[Authority Data Center]] was located there.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Incoming traffic was restricted to [[Drone barge/Legends|drone barges]] for transporting crops and Authority fleet vessels. Orron III had three moons.

==History==
During the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]], the [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] representing Orron III was participating tin the meeting of the [[Ministry of Defense|Defense Committee]]. [[Gender/Legends|She]] argued that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] should not send forces to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], against the [[Naddist]]s, as the planet was not a member of the Republic, and the threat of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] should remain a matter of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]].<ref name="Tales of the Jedi audio drama">[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]</ref>

On their attempt to rescue [[Klaus Vandangante/Legends|Klaus Vandangante]] from [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], after hiding the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] onboard a food barge they made an attempt to infiltrate an Authority Data Center on Orron III to get the prison's coordinates. Then Han and Chewbacca met up with a group led by [[Rekkon]] seeking to free family members from the prison. The attempt went badly and resulted in Chewbacca being captured and sent to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority's]] prison.<ref name="HSaSE" />

Near the completion of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], when the Alliance captured [[Toral (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Toral'']], Intelligence examined documents found in its memory and discovered that a weapon convoy was to be found near the planet. ''[[The Tone]], [[Uhuru]]'' and ''[[Hyko]]'' was gathered there when the forces showed up; the convoy was [[Battle of Orron III|destroyed]] by [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from the [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]]. Communications Satellites were stolen by the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] [[Phoenix (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Phoenix'']] from that base.<ref name="X-wing">[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]</ref>
